title: Converting SQL Server types and rules to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud's Database Migration Service uses Gemini to assist developers in converting SQL Server database schemas and code to PostgreSQL. Gemini acts as an AI tutor that not only converts schema types and rules but also explains the conversion process to help developers build PostgreSQL expertise.
writeup: This video covers how Google Cloud's Database Migration Service uses Gemini to convert SQL Server schemas and code to PostgreSQL, handling type and rule conversions as part of the migration. The point of interest is that Gemini operates as an AI tutor: beyond producing the converted schema, it explains the reasoning behind each conversion. The takeaway is that the tool aims to build PostgreSQL expertise alongside completing the migration, rather than treating conversion as a black box.
